name: Computershare Limited.
analysis: CPU's 9-SMA is above the 26 and price has reclaimed them. It is coming off a base, 11% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. Price has broken above the base high at A$36.2300. Trade idea: entry A$36.5500, stop A$33.4917, target A$45.7249 (3.00:1) — then trail it.
